articles.title_en: The Central Bank will reward banks for transfers of salaries by legal entities in digital rubles
articles.lead_en: The reward will be 67 kopecks, but not less than 10 rubles for the register of orders, the Bank of Russia said
articles.title_raw: ЦБ будет вознаграждать банки за переводы юрлицами зарплаты в цифровых рублях
articles.lead_raw: Вознаграждение составит 67 копеек, но не менее 10 рублей за реестр распоряжений, заявили в Банке России

articles.title_en: Possible ban on diesel fuel exports and measures to increase supplies to the Russian Federation. Novak's statements
articles.lead_en: The Deputy Prime Minister of the Russian Federation called the situation on the Russian fuel market difficult, but controllable
articles.title_raw: Возможный запрет на экспорт дизтоплива и меры по росту поставок в РФ. Заявления Новака
articles.lead_raw: Вице-премьер РФ назвал ситуацию на российском топливном рынке непростой, но контролируемой

articles.title_en: As Wartime Slump Deepens, Russia’s Construction Sector Is on Shaky Ground
articles.lead_en: The slowdown, which has been described as the industry’s "most serious stress test since the 2009 crisis," risks affecting the broader economy.

articles.title_en: US economic militarization and oil price trends: topics of Kremlin’s briefing
articles.lead_en: Despite fluctuations in the global oil prices, the macroeconomic stability of the Russian economy is firmly maintained, Dmitry Peskov emphasized

articles.title_en: Kremlin Assures Macroeconomic Stability Despite Volatility in Energy Markets
articles.lead_en: Top spokesman Dmitry Peskov said Russia’s macroeconomic stability is “not a matter of doubt for anyone.”
articles.title_raw: Kremlin Assures Macroeconomic Stability Despite Volatility in Energy Markets

articles.title_en: The Russian stock market began to grow during main trading
articles.lead_en: The RTS index rose by 0.27% to 992.77 points
articles.title_raw: Российский рынок акций перешел к росту в ходе основных торгов
articles.lead_raw: Индекс РТС поднимался на 0,27%, до 992,77 пункта

articles.title_en: EU sanctions against Russia punish Europeans — Spanish politician
articles.lead_en: Javier Hurtado Mira pointed out that "sanctions are like shooting oneself in the foot, and that applies not only to Spain but to the entire European Union when it comes to the rising cost of living and inflation"
articles.title_raw: EU sanctions against Russia punish Europeans — Spanish politician
articles.lead_raw: Javier Hurtado Mira pointed out that "sanctions are like shooting oneself in the foot, and that applies not only to Spain but to the entire European Union when it comes to the rising cost of living and inflation"

articles.title_en: The Russian stock market closed with a decline in the main indices
articles.lead_en: In part, the market is reacting to a slowdown in the rate of sequestration of the Central Bank’s key rate, and in part to a decline in oil prices, explained BCS World of Investments expert Andrei Smirnov
articles.title_raw: Российский рынок акций закрылся снижением основных индексов
articles.lead_raw: Отчасти рынок реагирует на замедление темпа секвестра ключевой ставки ЦБ, отчасти - на снижение цен на нефть, пояснил эксперт "БКС мир инвестиций" Андрей Смирнов

articles.title_en: Parliamentarians of the Russian Federation and Belarus approved changes to the SG budget for 2025-2026
articles.lead_en: The expenditure side of the budget for 2026 has been increased by more than 1 billion rubles, noted Secretary of State of the Union State Sergei Glazyev
articles.title_raw: Парламентарии РФ и Белоруссии утвердили изменения в бюджет СГ на 2025-2026 годы
articles.lead_raw: Расходная часть бюджета на 2026 год увеличена более чем на 1 млрд рублей, отметил госсекретарь Союзного государства Сергей Глазьев
